use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OR PROPHYLAXIS OF ANGINA PECTORIS AND ARRHYTHMIA

indications.text:
LO/OVRAL-28 is indicated for use by females of reproductive potential to prevent pregnancy.
In a study of 1,287 women with a total of 11,085 cycles or 852.7 women-years of usage, the
pregnancy rate in women age 15-40 years was approximately 1 pregnancy per 100 women-years
of use.
1
Reference ID: 443...
